$comment: Single root package. During 0.x: breaking (feat!/BREAKING CHANGE) -> minor, feat/fix -> patch, so `^0.x` consumers auto-get features+fixes and are shielded from breaking changes. include-component-in-tag:false keeps tags as vX.Y.Z (the repo has no tags yet; the first release-please tag will be vX.Y.Z). To graduate to 1.0.0, land a commit with `Release-As: 1.0.0` in its body.
